title: CT15 static tactic graph — Rank forcing
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT15 (Rank forcing). It requires the complete 21-node array in fixed source order from CT15.N01 through CT15.N21, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT15 (Rank forcing) tactic specification; must equal "CT15".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N01, "Definition — raw local tests with target-relevant rank r_T", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N01, "Definition — raw local tests with target-relevant rank r_T"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N01, "Definition — raw local tests with target-relevant rank r_T"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N02, "Repair datum — rank definition not target-relative", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N02, "Repair datum — rank definition not target-relative"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N02, "Repair datum — rank definition not target-relative"; must equal "recovery", meaning this node records and repairs missing data or a missing supporting rule.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N03, "Lemma — redesign rank relative to T", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N03, "Lemma — redesign rank relative to T"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N03, "Lemma — redesign rank relative to T"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N04, "Lemma — rank is defined relative to the target predicate?", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N04, "Lemma — rank is defined relative to the target predicate?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N04, "Lemma — rank is defined relative to the target predicate?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite rank — scope audit", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite rank — scope audit"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite rank — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N06, "Dichotomy lemma — does a rank drop occur?", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N06, "Dichotomy lemma — does a rank drop occur?"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N06, "Dichotomy lemma — does a rank drop occur?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N07, "Lemma — rank drop produces structural dependence", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N07, "Lemma — rank drop produces structural dependence"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N07, "Lemma — rank drop produces structural dependence"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N08, "Routing theorem — what dependence is certified?", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N08, "Routing theorem — what dependence is certified?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N08, "Routing theorem — what dependence is certified?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_15→3 — rank defect", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_15→3 — rank defect"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_15→3 — rank defect"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_15→7 — rank exchange", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_15→7 — rank exchange"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_15→7 — rank exchange"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N11, "Payload lemma — build P_15→16 — rank delocalization", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N11, "Payload lemma — build P_15→16 — rank delocalization"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N11, "Payload lemma — build P_15→16 — rank delocalization"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N12, "CT 3 — external types", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N12, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N12, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N13, "CT 7 — exchange", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N13, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N13, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N14, "CT 16 — whole-object types", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N14, "CT 16 — whole-object types"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N14, "CT 16 — whole-object types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N15, "Lemma — full-rank branch gives independent coordinates", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N15, "Lemma — full-rank branch gives independent coordinates"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N15, "Lemma — full-rank branch gives independent coordinates"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N16, "Lemma — recorded rank charge", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N16, "Lemma — recorded rank charge"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N16, "Lemma — recorded rank charge"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N17, "Comparison theorem — does rank demand exceed cap?", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N17, "Comparison theorem — does rank demand exceed cap?"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N17, "Comparison theorem — does rank demand exceed cap?"; must equal "comparison", meaning this node compares certified quantities and routes every outcome.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N18, "C4 — rank budget contradiction", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N18".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N18, "C4 — rank budget contradiction"; must equal the integer 18.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N18, "C4 — rank budget contradiction"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N19, "Payload record — P_15→4: rank demand ledger", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N19".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N19, "Payload record — P_15→4: rank demand ledger"; must equal the integer 19.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N19, "Payload record — P_15→4: rank demand ledger"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N20, "Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N20".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N20, "Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger"; must equal the integer 20.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N20, "Lemma — P_15→4 satisfies CT4 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT15.N21, "CT 4 — charging", in CT15 (Rank forcing); must equal "CT15.N21".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT15.N21, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal the integer 21.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT15.N21, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT15 (Rank forcing); must contain exactly 21 generic node objects in source order from CT15.N01 through CT15.N21, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
